plugins.photosPermission: Mellerick Field uses your photo library to attach job photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Mellerick Field uses your camera to take job photos and evidence.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Mellerick Field uses your location to timestamp and geo-tag site photos, and to automatically clock you in/out and track travel time when you arrive at or leave a job site.

plugins.microphonePermission: Mellerick Field uses your microphone to record job completion voice reports.
